overall_arc.name: opening — ground in shadow
overall_arc.intent: Establish stillness on a near-tonic A. A single solitary anchor in deep shadow — moonlight as a thin line, or a head bowed. Leave generous space; the room is just beginning to listen.

overall_arc.name: first ascent — warmth gathers
overall_arc.intent: Centroid rises and pitch shifts to C# / G#. The room warms: an open palm finding low candlelight, loose linen catching soft side light. Begin gentle motion on one anchor; do not crowd.

overall_arc.name: muhayyar gesture — the high D crossing
overall_arc.intent: Cycle 8 brings the only D of the track at the brightest centroid — the closest the piece gets to a muhayyar arrival. Commit with elevation, not impact: a soft bloom, a sustained line of moonlight widening, a luminous photographic anchor. Background may shift toward pale candlelight.

overall_arc.name: sustained middle — density without rupture
overall_arc.intent: Dense articulation across F#, G#, C#, B. Vary earlier motifs rather than invent. A single feather might tremble; loose linen might drift; the back of someone at a window joins the room. One composite scene lives here.

overall_arc.name: phrase break and quiet descent
overall_arc.intent: Cycle 16 is a deep exhale — dark timbre, very sparse, low centroid. Fade aging material. Allow stillness, then drift through quiet falling cycles with breath on cold glass and a solitary figure receding into dusk.

overall_arc.name: late rising — a second gathering
overall_arc.intent: Centroid lifts again, articulation thickens. Echo an earlier motif (the line of moonlight, or the open palm) in a new position or weight. Compositional memory, not new invention.

overall_arc.name: final tableau — settling
overall_arc.intent: Stop opening new threads. Hold the strongest image/text/SVG relationship. The last cycle rises slightly — let one breath release, do not punctuate. End with the room composed: a thin line of moonlight, an open palm, one phrase of testimony.

per_cycle_intent.intent: Place one durable anchor: a thin line of moonlight on still water, low and quiet. Nothing else.
Hold. Small breath of silence in the brief silence-ratio blip; perhaps a single text fragment of solitary testimony.
Centroid begins to climb. A second anchor enters softly — a head bowed in shadow with soft side light.
Pitch shifts to C#. Place an SVG line of moonlight that breathes with hijaz_intensity. Background may warm slightly.
Bright timbre, intense. An open palm in low candlelight as a photographic anchor — the figurative heart of the piece.
Peak intensity, dense articulation. A composite scene arrives: text + SVG bloom + image. The room commits to its first weight.
Pitch shifts to G#. Sustain the bloom; perhaps a paletteShift toward warm parchment. Do not add new threads.
Falling intensity but pitch holds at G#. Fade an aging element if scene is dense; otherwise let it breathe.

Muhayyar crossing — the only D, brightest centroid. setBackground toward pale candlelight; place a sustained luminous SVG (held horizon, slow opacity rise) with hijaz_tahwil bound to gentle scale impulse.
Building, dense, returning to A. Composite scene committing the arrival: a hand cupped around a small flame as photographic anchor + a phrase of text.
Bright sustained passage on C#. Hold; perhaps morphElement on the moonlight line into a slow ripple.
Pitch jumps to F# — a transient color shift. Sparse articulation. A single feather on dark cloth enters with tremble motion.
Rapid articulation on G#. Add a localized p5 sketch — a slow ripple on dark water — for continuous gesture.
Centroid spikes again on C#. Bright. Echo the early moonlight line in a new position; or transformElement on the held SVG.
Pitch on B (briefly). Loose linen falling photograph enters; let it drift with breathe preset.
Rapid articulation, building. Place a second testimonial text fragment that accumulates with the first.
Phrase break — very dark timbre, sparse, lowest centroid. Fade two aging elements. Allow the room to exhale. No new placement unless director debt is overdue.
Dense articulation but falling intensity on G#. A back-at-the-window-at-night photograph arrives quietly.
Rising centroid on C# but very sparse onsets. Hold. Perhaps a paletteShift cooling slightly.
Quiet, falling, warm timbre, A. A breath on cold glass photograph or p5 sketch — figurative quiet.
Rapid articulation but quiet — soft inner motion. Solitary figure walking at dusk image enters.
Rising sharply, dense, on C#. Echo: bring back a variation on the early moonlight line. Compositional memory.
Sustained on C#. transformElement or morphElement on a held anchor — the open palm warming further.
Quiet easing on C# — a soft cresting. setBackground may shift toward deeper shadow with a hint of pale candlelight to prepare the close.
Final tableau begins. Fade the most recent passing gestures. Hold the strongest moonlight + open palm + text relationship.
Sustained quiet on G#. No new placement. Let the held composition read.
A small late lift — moderate intensity rising, brighter. One soft pulse via paletteShift or a gentle scale on the moonlight line. Not a punctuation, an exhale of light.

anchors: thin line of moonlight on still water at night
head bowed in shadow with soft side light
single hand cupped around a small flame
loose linen falling across a dark surface
the back of a person looking out a window at night
solitary figure walking across a dark plain at dusk
breath on cold glass at night
slow ripple expanding on a dark pool

palette_progression.palette: deep shadow ground (#2a1f14) with a single thread of pale candlelight (#f5e6c8)
warming — sand gold (#d4a574) gathering into burnt ochre (#c4894a) over deep shadow
luminous parchment — pale candlelight (#f5e6c8) and warm parchment (#e8d4a0) at the muhayyar gesture
deepening warmth — burnt ochre and deep terracotta (#8b4a2a) under sustained articulation
cooling toward slate blue-grey (#4a6670) and muted steel (#8a9ba0) for the phrase-break and descent
muted warm return — sand gold and warm parchment again, dimmer than the first ascent
pale candlelight settling against deep shadow — a held quiet, with one final soft warm exhale

foreshadow_pairs.note: thin line of moonlight planted in opening; widens / blooms at the muhayyar D crossing
open palm in candlelight planted in first ascent; transformed/morphed warmer in the late rising as compositional memory
single feather plants the trembling-figure register; the back-at-window photograph at the descent inherits its solitary frame
hand cupped around a small flame at muhayyar; final cycle's soft warm exhale echoes its held warmth
head bowed in shadow plants the solitary-interior posture; final tableau settles into the same posture but as the last image still standing
